title: BackFromThePast
description: BackFromThePast is a mod that adds back the old minecraft textures from alpha, bêta & classic.
body:
“BackFromThePast is a mod made to bring back old textures without removing the new ones! So I brought back all the old blocks!”

If you have recomendation, tell me ! I will try my best ! If there problems, tell me and i will fix it !

[Come on the discord for the support !](https://discord.gg/AGyR6SsFyy)
